title: 14-Piece Nylon Spring Clamps, Plastic Heavy Duty Grip Clips Set-14pcs 2 inch Clamps
features: High hardness nylon material and high toughness spring, anti-slip serration inside the clip can increase the clamping force, the clamping is stable and durable
Orange adjustable chuck can change the angle according to the object, which can effectively protect the surface of the working object from damage
The pattern on the handle increases the frictional force, and the hand feels comfortable when grasped hard, non-slip and firm
Strong spring clamps is the ideal tool for photographic muslin backdrop screen, reflective board, woodworking, photo, or other handicraft canvas
description: Product Description This set of fixtures can be used to fix object, suitable for you to do DIY works at home, or in a studio or carpentry shop. Specifications: Material: Nylon & Plastic Size: 2/3/4/6 inch Tips: The thickness of the object sometimes determines the size of the clamping force.
